title: JustTimm's Vanilla Additions - Autumn Edition
description: An autumn style resource pack for Vanilla Additions.
body:
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/CCdAPoD.png)](https://server.pro/?ref=JustTimmsAdditions "Sponsored by Server.pro")
[🖥️**Java**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions) | [🎮**Bedrock**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/justtimms-vanilla-additions-bedrock) | [⚙️**Mod Support**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-mod-support-add-on) | [🌙**Dark GUI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-dark-gui-add-on) | [🍁**Autumn Edition**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-autumn-edition) | [❄️**Winter Edition**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-winter-edition) | [🎅🏻**Xmas Add-On**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-winter-edition)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Vanilla Additions - Autumn Edition is an additional pack for my original pack Vanilla Additions. This pack changes Minecraft to give it an autumn feel while still having a vanilla style. Please only use this pack on top of my Vanilla Additions resource pack! You can find Vanilla Additions - Autumn Edition on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-autumn-edition), [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/justtimms-vanilla-additions-autumn-edition) and [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/justtimm-s-vanilla-additions-autumn-edition/)! ## Download [Vanilla Additions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions) to make this pack work correctly! ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[📰**Twitter**](https://twitter.com/JT_Additions) | [📸**Instagram**](https://www.instagram.com/justtimms_additions) | [💬**Discord**](https://discord.gg/runTSv2) | [📽️**YouTube**](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCV4vHsM-p6GXsJTU-S7GSLQ?view_as=subscriber) | [📱**TikTok**](https://www.tiktok.com/@justtimms_additions) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- 🧊 Custom Block Textures - ✏️ Custom Item Textures - 🗑️ Custom GUI's - 🐔 Custom Mob Textures - 🏷️ CTM Biome Based: - ⛅ Sky - 🌳 Nature - 🌲 Grass/Foliage
⚙️ Recommended settings Video Settings -> Details... - Trees: Fancy/Default/Smart - Swamp Colors: **ON** Video Settings -> Quality... - Emissive Textures: **ON** - Connected Textures: **Fancy/Fast** - Custom Sky: **ON** - Custom Entity Models: **ON** - Random Entities: **ON** - Custom Items: **ON** - Custom GUIs: **ON** For people with shaders: - Waving Grass: **OFF**
(This is because you can sometimes you see a grass texture on a place where it shouldn't be.)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/e5quQk0.png)](https://server.pro/?ref=JustTimmsAdditions "Sponsored by Server.pro") ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
You are **FREE** to: - Use this pack on your server. - Alter the pack for personal use. - Combine with other packs for personal use and play. - Use this pack in YouTube videos. (Credit is appreciated) You are **NOT** allowed to: - Claim ownership over the textures/models in this pack. - Reupload the entire resource pack elsewhere. - Redistribute unedited individual assets from the pack without permission and credit. - Redistribute edited assets from the pack without permission and credit. Thanks in advance. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/bup8Qya.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions "Download Vanilla Additions") [![Button](https://i.imgur.com/VCHp1x4.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-winter-edition "Download Vanilla Additions - Winter Edition") [![Button](https://i.imgur.com/XOj3uj4.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-dark-gui-add-on "Download Vanilla Additions - Dark GUI Add-On")
